textByHash.1d992c9f8504c3c49a48076a55bdd14b8cde4cdb: We used to run cart trips down to Shilo Village in south Karamja. Since the troubles we had we've had to stop them though, too many people got killed.
textByHash.2422e98b8853255893f7f5d43c00246e963dc4a7: I am offering a cart ride to Shilo Village, if you're interested. It will cost coins. Is that okay?
textByHash.6cbde33873e20f4a81074dd48dc5255b3f021442: Okay, Bwana, let me know if you change your mind.
textByHash.8cf3a088c8314b0e91ccbb4b0d157eceb895b0d7: I am offering a cart ride to Shilo Village, if you're interested. For you, it's free.
textByHash.9088572cea46e5b25193c8283b7f739329fab893: Sorry, but it looks as if you don't have enough money. Come and see me when you have enough for the ride.
